descFull: Open-source protocol suite standardizing LLM, Vector, Graph, and Embedding infrastructure across LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen, CrewAI, Semantic Kernel, and MCP. 3,330+ conformance tests. One protocol. Any framework. Any provider.
